transcript: Speaker A: Myself Raj. I have eight years of experience in quality check. Speaker B: [Hindi] Eight years of experience, yet such bad English? Communication is very important in our company. We cannot hire someone who cannot speak two words of English. Speaker A: I am Raj. I have eight years of experience and have saved my company a lot of money with my work. Speaker B: [Hindi] Oh wow! Your resume is very good, and your English is excellent. Our company needs people like you. Speaker A: [Hindi] This change in my life is because of SpeakX. I thought my Hindi-medium background would hold me back, but SpeakX's AI English teacher made me confident in just two weeks. The AI teachers don't laugh or judge. Download SpeakX before time runs out.
on_screen_text: [Hindi captions showing the dialogue of the interview and the testimonial about SpeakX, emphasizing key phrases like 'bad English?', 'communication is important', 'AI English teacher', and 'download SpeakX']
summary: A job candidate is initially rejected due to poor English but succeeds after using SpeakX for two weeks. He explains how the app's non-judgmental AI tutor helped him gain confidence and urges viewers to download SpeakX.
